Our Work

The owners and properties we work with.

Independent owners across Australia trust Indi with their commercials. Here's who they are, and what they say.

Start your free discovery

Real outcomes, honestly presented

In their words

What owners say.

Shared directly by the owners we work with, published exactly as they wrote it.

Having run an independent hotel for many years, it is very easy to lose touch with the latest strategies and technology out there. I love being independent, but with the support of Indi Hotels in the background. If you are a hotel owner, join Indi Hotels and forget the chain brands. You will pay less in OTA commissions, your hotel will receive more direct bookings, you will see growth in overall revenue, and all without the compliance headaches and costs associated with joining a hotel chain.

Andrew Macdonald · Owner · Hotel Nelson & Little Nel Cafe

Indi Hotels provided exceptional service and support from day one. Opening a new hotel is always a challenging time, so I was delighted that Indi Hotels were able to come on board pre-opening. They did everything that was asked and promised, plus a lot more on top. The website Indi Hotels provided is brilliant. It currently delivers two bookings for every OTA booking, keeping commissions at a minimum in these challenging times. I can't recommend Indi Hotels highly enough, so if you need a break from a hotel chain or help with your own independent business, then you'd better call Indi Hotels!

Lawrence Heasman · Group GM · City Apartment Hotel Group

As a new entrant to the accommodation sector in late 2024, I couldn't have asked for a better partner than Indi. Their wisdom doesn't stop at the revenue side, the team really knows the game, and the knowledge they've shared has shaped how we run the whole business. They're readily available whenever I need them, and I've genuinely loved working with and learning from them. For any owner, new or established, I can't recommend Indi highly enough.

Michael Stephens · Owner · Albany Motel & Apartments

A closer look

Three properties, priced with intent.

Built around the strategy and, where an owner has shared one, their own words. We publish RevPAR growth only, never room counts, occupancy, ADR or total revenue, so a property's numbers stay its own.

Case study

A new owner's first full year, with Indi behind the commercials.

Albany Motel & Apartments · Albany, Western Australia

Property photo, hero Landscape. Exterior or a room, natural light.
Property photo, detail Portrait or square.
+16.1%

RevPAR growth, YoY

Full financial year. Results reflect the property's first full year working with Indi. Every property and market is different, and individual results vary.

"As a new entrant to the accommodation sector in late 2024, I couldn't have asked for a better partner than Indi. Their wisdom doesn't stop at the revenue side, the team really knows the game, and the knowledge they've shared has shaped how we run the whole business. They're readily available whenever I need them, and I've genuinely loved working with and learning from them. For any owner, new or established, I can't recommend Indi highly enough."

Michael Stephens Owner · Albany Motel & Apartments
Start your free discovery See who else we work with
Case study

More revenue, from fewer rooms sold.

Chasing occupancy is the instinct. Pricing with intent is the discipline. At Hobart City Apartments, Indi priced each channel and each date deliberately rather than filling rooms at any price, and the property earned significantly more from a slightly smaller book of business.

Hobart City Apartments · Hobart, Tasmania

Property photo, hero Landscape. Exterior or a room, natural light.
Property photo, detail Portrait or square.
+11.3%

RevPAR growth, YoY

Full financial year. Every property and market is different, and individual results vary.

Start your free discovery See who else we work with
Case study

An experienced owner, still finding upside.

Andrew has run an independent hotel for many years and knows his market intimately. With Indi behind the commercials, both sides of the equation moved up together, more rooms sold and a stronger rate, which is the clearest sign that demand is being captured rather than discounted for.

Hotel Nelson · Nelson Bay, New South Wales

Property photo, hero Landscape. Exterior or a room, natural light.
Property photo, detail Portrait or square. Or Little Nel Cafe.
+8.2%

RevPAR growth, YoY

Full financial year. Every property and market is different, and individual results vary.

"Having run an independent hotel for many years, it is very easy to lose touch with the latest strategies and technology out there. I love being independent, but with the support of Indi Hotels in the background. If you are a hotel owner, join Indi Hotels and forget the chain brands. You will pay less in OTA commissions, your hotel will receive more direct bookings, you will see growth in overall revenue, and all without the compliance headaches and costs associated with joining a hotel chain."

Andrew Macdonald Owner · Hotel Nelson & Little Nel Cafe
